theme_and_archetype.vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, high-tech command center. Designed for security operators and affiliate marketers who value data density and raw performance over decorative fluff.

typography.font_setup_instructions: Import Chivo and IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts. Apply Chivo to all h1-h6 tags. Apply IBM Plex Mono to body, tables, and data visualizations.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy. High density for dashboard, generous for marketing.

dashboard_layout.style: Control Room style. Every pixel utilized. Stretch items to match neighbors.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain the brutalist Swiss aesthetic.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-[#111113]), 1px solid border (border-[#27272A]), NO shadow. On hover, border lightens to border-gray-600.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.marketing_hero: Dark overlay (bg-black/50) over hero image, ensuring high contrast for white text.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.sticky_header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.tables_and_logs: Retro-Futurism touch: Use IBM Plex Mono for all table cells. Row hover effect should be a faint highlight (bg-white/5).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Solid fill for primary (bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white). Outline for secondary (border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10). Sharp corners (rounded-none).

components.forms: Use Shadcn forms. Inputs should have bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500. No rounded corners.
components.campaign_drawer: Use Shadcn Sheet (right side). Dark backdrop blur. Density high for form fields.
components.charts: Recharts. Remove all axes lines, keep only horizontal grid lines (stroke: #27272A). Use neon green (#00FF66) for valid traffic line, neon red (#FF3B30) for blocked bots.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Dense padding (py-2). Use text-xs for log entries to simulate a terminal.
components.badges: Square badges. Bot: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20. Human: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20.

animations.hover: Fast transitions (150ms ease-in-out) for buttons and rows.

hero_background.description: Dark room setup with code displayed on PC monitors. Use with a dark overlay for the marketing hero section.

feature_server.description: Server racks in a data center. Use for the infrastructure/reliability feature section.

matrix_code.description: Matrix code still. Use subtly behind the API/JS Snippet generation page.

pages_instructions.marketing_page: Hero section with h1 and CTA. Trust grid showing 'Advanced Bot Detection', 'GeoIP Filtering', 'VPN/Proxy Blocking'. Use the 'feature_server' image in a bento box layout.
pages_instructions.auth_pages: Simple, centered card. Minimalist. JWT-based email/password login.
pages_instructions.dashboard_overview: Top row: 4 stat cards (Total Visitors, Bots Blocked, Real Users, Block Rate). Middle row: Main conversion/traffic chart (Recharts). Bottom: Recent campaigns list.
pages_instructions.campaigns_list: Table of campaigns. 'Create Campaign' button opens a Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) containing fields: name, money page URL, safe page URL, country/device/OS/language filters, and a toggle for VPN/proxy/datacenter blocking.
pages_instructions.click_logs: High-density table (Terminal look with IBM Plex Mono). Columns: Timestamp, IP, Country, UA, Device, ISP, Decision (Money/Safe badge), Reason.
pages_instructions.bot_filter_rules: List of active static rules and customizable block lists.
pages_instructions.integration_snippet: A page showing a code block (JS embed and cURL). Use a dark card with a copy-to-clipboard button.
pages_instructions.settings: Account settings, password reset, JWT token management.

testing: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.
